title: Define Month Calendar Properties
text: Define Month Calendar Properties Define the properties for this Month Calendar widget. For more information, see (umonthcalendar) MonthCalendar . How to Setting Widget Properties Related Links Widgets In Uniface, widgets are user interface controls. They can display data values, control how values are modified, and determine the appearance of those objects. Most widgets are field-level widgets. Was this topic helpful? Like Dislike
